toolPurpose: Send a plain text message to a WhatsApp user via the Business Cloud API.

phone_number_id.description: The WhatsApp Business phone number ID (sender)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format (e.g., +1234567890)

preview_url.description: Whether to show URL previews in the message

toolPurpose: Send a pre-approved template message to a WhatsApp user. Required for initiating conversations outside the 24-hour window.

phone_number_id.description: The WhatsApp Business phone number ID (sender)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format

template_name.description: Name of the approved message template

language_code.description: Language code for the template (e.g., en_US)

components.description: Array of template component objects with parameter values for header, body, and buttons

toolPurpose: Send media (image, document, audio, video) to a WhatsApp user.

phone_number_id.description: The WhatsApp Business phone number ID (sender)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format

media_url.description: Public URL of the media file to send

media_id.description: Previously uploaded media ID (alternative to media_url)

caption.description: Caption for image or video media (max 1024 characters)

toolPurpose: Check the delivery and read status of a previously sent WhatsApp message.

message_id.description: The wamid of the message to check status for

phone_number_id.description: The WhatsApp Business phone number ID that sent the message

toolPurpose: List all approved message templates for the WhatsApp Business account.
